channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
• Introduction

Hi,

I am Sameer Khan. I am a student of Azim Premji University doing Bsc. Information Science (Honour). As a part of course I am cuyrrently learning how to make blog and associate it with github for the proper update. Throughout the course I will be sharing the reflection and learning that I had through this Blog.

  • Course Intro

  • This is the course in which we are majorly dealing how to manage the information and analyse it. To have hand on learning on whatever we are stydying in course we do have practical LAB SESSIONS on every wednesday for 4 hours.
